demo.description: The starting point for your next project is based on MUI. Easy customization helps you build apps faster and better.

notFound.title: Sorry, page not found!
notFound.description: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for. Perhaps you've mistyped the URL? Be sure to check your spelling.

forbidden.title: No permission
forbidden.description: The page you're trying to access has restricted access. Please refer to your system administrator.

serverError.title: 500 Internal server error
serverError.description: There was an error, please try again later.

filters.endDateError: End date must be later than start date
